overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a dark cloak traversing a desolate stone plateau and entering a shallow mountain stream in a valley. The environment features rocky terrain, distant mountains, and overcast lighting typical of high-end game engine rendering.

events.description: character approaches the edge of the stone plateau revealing the valley below

agents.ego_description: character in dark cloak runs steadily across the flat stone surface toward the plateau edge

entered.detail: flat gray stone ground with visible cracks and weathered texture
sunken hollow area or pit in the stone surface
distant wooden debris or collapsed structure on the plateau

segments.scene_description: The character runs across a desolate, flat stone plateau with limited horizon visibility. The ground features cracks and a noticeable depression, with distant wooden ruins visible to the right. The environment is barren with no vegetation under an overcast sky.

events.description: character steps from dry stone into shallow water of the valley stream
camera tilts upward revealing expansive mountain vista and cloudy sky

agents.ego_description: character wades through shallow valley water moving toward the distant mountain passage

entered.detail: clear shallow water covering the valley floor with visible stones beneath
tall rocky mountains with misty peaks visible in the distance
steep rocky cliff face with patches of dry vegetation
brown dry grass growing along the edges of the water

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shallow mountain stream, wading through clear water toward a distant valley passage. Rocky cliffs and dry grass banks line the waterway, while the view opens to reveal an expansive mountain range ahead under heavy overcast skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate stone plateau that gradually opens into a wide mountain valley. It begins with the character running across a barren, cracked expanse of flat stone under an overcast sky, passing distant wooden ruins on the right. As the terrain dips, the camera follows the character as they transition from the dry plateau into the clear, shallow waters of a mountain stream. The scene then expands to reveal rocky cliffs and banks of dry grass lining the waterway, before finally opening up to a vast view of a distant mountain range under heavy clouds.
